creator: daveh@coreng.com.au
text:
We need to specify a source address to the "ping" command called
	by the Nagios plugin "check_ping".

Fix: Included is a patch against "check_ping.c 1810 2007-10-25 20:43:04Z"
	that accepts a new option "-S src-addr" (or "--src-addr addr"); it
	no doubt needs improvement e.g. support in "configure" etc.
